note: General principles on when notice is treated as given/received, which contracts commonly adapt for electronic delivery.
Baseline common-law principles on how and when notice under a contract is treated as effectively given, which a notice clause typically displaces or supplements.
General principles distinguishing written from oral communications, which contractual writing requirements for notice are typically drafted to formalize and make enforceable.
Actual-receipt principles govern notice absent contrary agreement; a stated address removes ambiguity about where notice must be sent.
